info.title: ScrapeBadger Amazon API
info.description: Amazon marketplace scraping API for searching products, fetching product details, offers, reviews, listings, sellers, and reference data across 20 marketplaces.

get.description: Search the Amazon catalog with filters and sorting.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search keywords.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, fr, ...).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated results.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort order for results.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Department/category alias to scope the search (the i= parameter).

parameters.name: min_price
parameters.description: Minimum price filter in the marketplace's local currency.

parameters.name: max_price
parameters.description: Maximum price filter in the marketplace's local currency.

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: Delivery postal/zip code for localized pricing.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Locale for results, e.g. en_US, fr_FR.

query.description: The search query that was executed.

get.description: Get Amazon search autocomplete suggestions for keyword research.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Partial search term to expand into suggestions.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

alias.description: Department alias the suggestion is scoped to, if any.

get.description: Full product detail by ASIN (price, variants, badges, buybox, ranks, ...).

parameters.name: asin
parameters.description: The Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) of the product.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: Delivery postal/zip code for a localized buybox.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: Locale for the product page, e.g. en_US, de_DE.

product.title: Echo Dot (4th Gen) Smart speaker with Alexa
feature_bullets: Meet the Echo Dot - Our most popular smart speaker with a fabric design.
Voice control your entertainment - Stream songs from Amazon Music, Apple Music, Spotify.
product.description: Echo Dot is our most compact smart speaker that fits perfectly into small spaces.

top_reviews.title: Great little speaker
top_reviews.body: Sound quality is excellent for the size.

get.description: All third-party offers for an ASIN, including the Buy Box winner.

parameters.name: asin
parameters.description: The ASIN of the product to list offers for.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: Delivery postal/zip code for localized offers and delivery estimates.

get.description: Customer reviews for an ASIN (featured + paginated, with filters).

parameters.name: asin
parameters.description: The ASIN of the product to fetch reviews for.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated reviews.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort order for reviews.

parameters.name: star
parameters.description: Filter reviews by star rating or sentiment.

parameters.name: verified_only
parameters.description: Only return reviews from verified purchases.

parameters.name: media_only
parameters.description: Only return reviews that include images or video.

ratings_total.description: Total number of ratings for the product.

reviews.title: Great little speaker
reviews.body: Sound quality is excellent for the size. Setup was quick and Alexa is responsive.
reviews.date_raw: Reviewed in the United States on May 28, 2026

get.description: Top-selling products for a category (browse node).

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Bestsellers node id or category slug (e.g. electronics).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (each page covers 50 ranks; max 2).

get.description: Newly released products for a category (browse node).

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: New-releases node id or category slug.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number (each page covers 50 ranks; max 2).

get.description: Current Amazon deals (lightning deals, best deals).

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category alias to scope the deals feed.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated deals.

get.description: List products within an Amazon browse-node category.

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Amazon browse-node id to list products from.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated results.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort order for results.

get.description: Seller profile, ratings and feedback summary.

parameters.name: seller_id
parameters.description: The Amazon seller ID (the value of the seller= URL parameter).

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

get.description: Products listed in a seller's storefront.

parameters.name: seller_id
parameters.description: The Amazon seller ID whose storefront to list.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated storefront results.

get.description: Buyer feedback entries for a seller.

parameters.name: seller_id
parameters.description: The Amazon seller ID whose feedback to list.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code (com, co.uk, de, ...).

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for paginated feedback entries.

rating.description: Star rating left by the buyer (1-5).

date_raw.description: Raw date string as shown on Amazon.

feedback.body: Fast shipping and item exactly as described. Would buy again.

domain.description: Amazon domain TLD for this market (e.g. com, co.uk).

country_code.description: ISO country code used for proxy geo-targeting.

get.description: List common Amazon department/category aliases and bestseller nodes.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Amazon marketplace TLD or code. Category aliases are scoped per marketplace.

alias.description: Category alias usable in the search category parameter (the i= value).

bestsellers_node.description: Browse-node slug usable with bestsellers / new-releases.

raw.description: Price exactly as displayed on Amazon.

total_results.description: Total number of results across all pages.

position.description: Position of the result on the page (1-based).

link.description: Full URL to the product page.

is_sponsored.description: Whether the result is a sponsored placement.

is_amazons_choice.description: Whether the item has the Amazon's Choice badge.

is_best_seller.description: Whether the item has the Best Seller badge.

bought_past_month.description: Purchase-volume hint (e.g. "5K+ bought in past month").

rating_breakdown.description: Percentage of ratings per star bucket (five_star ... one_star).

variants.description: Variation children with asin, attributes, price, is_current.

bestsellers_rank.description: Best-seller ranks with rank, category, link.

buybox.description: Buy Box winner: seller_name, seller_id, price, fulfillment.

seller.description: Seller summary: name, id, link, rating, ratings_total, ratings_percentage_positive.

buybox_winner.description: Whether this offer currently wins the Buy Box.

rating.description: Star rating left by the reviewer (1-5).

profile.description: Reviewer profile: name, link, id, image.

feedback.description: Feedback windows (lifetime, 12mo, 90d, 30d) each with positive, neutral, negative, count.
